anchors.10: Distinctive Corvus product craft with complete authority truth and responsive polish
anchors.8: Polished, source-grounded, non-generic, and immediately usable
anchors.6: Usable but visually ordinary or weakly differentiated by profile
anchors.4: Generic dashboard, repeated cards, or unclear primary task

criteria.visualImpact: Cool paper, graph rules, typography, and the live flightpath form a recognizable Corvus identity.
criteria.sourceAlignment: Every visible surface and interaction visibly reflects cited source evidence and copy boundaries.
criteria.brandFit: Everyday clarity and developer evidence coexist without changing product or authority.
criteria.conversionClarity: Sign in, New thread, and Send form an unmistakable governed-work path.
criteria.responsiveIntegrity: Desktop, tablet, and mobile preserve composer access, focus, and hierarchy without overflow.
criteria.accessibility: Keyboard, labels, live regions, contrast, focus restoration, targets, and reduced motion pass.
criteria.motionTaste: The flightpath communicates real run state with runtime and reduced-motion evidence.
criteria.authorityTruth: Identity, membership, runtime, approval, billing, and capability claims remain server-authoritative.
criteria.genericnessPenalty: Penalize KPI tiles, repeated cards, generic AI gradients, fake terminal chrome, or copied product chrome.
